summary: Verified observability config changes: /api/metrics protected with bearer token, /api/health no regression
critical_code_review_comments: prometheus.yml correctly uses /api/metrics path with bearer token from credentials_file
docker-compose.prod.yml correctly includes observability stack (prometheus, grafana) with env-based credentials
observability/docker-compose.yml uses env vars for Grafana creds (GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER, GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD)
METRICS_TOKEN is properly passed to prometheus container and written to /etc/prometheus/metrics_token
context_for_next_testing_agent: Observability stack config verified. /api/metrics requires Bearer token (METRICS_TOKEN=dev-metrics-token). Prometheus config uses credentials_file for auth. All 5 tests passed.
